skills.description_en: At the end of your turn, you may exchange hand cards with another character, then reveal your hand and place all damage-dealing cards at the bottom of the deck in any order.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以观看一名其他角色的手牌，然后若其中有你可以使用的牌，你可以获得并使用其中一张。若此牌指定了其为目标，你与其各横置，然后其观看你的手牌。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Look at another character's hand cards. If any can be Used by you, gain and Use 1 of them. If that card designates them as a target, you and they each enter the Chain State, then they look at your hand.

skills.description_cn: 当你受到伤害后，你可以令至多X名角色从你开始逆时针方向依次选择一项：1.移动场上一张牌；2.弃置所有手牌并摸两张牌；3.弃置装备区里的所有牌并回复1点体力。（X为你已损失的体力值）
skills.description_en: After you take damage, have up to X characters starting from you, going counter-clockwise, each choose one: 1. Move 1 field card; 2. Discard all hand and draw 2; 3. Discard all Equipment and recover 1 HP (X = your HP Lost).

skills.description_cn: 当你使用伤害类牌时，你可令其中一名目标获得1枚 “钝”标记。有钝”标记的角色于其出牌阶段使用基本牌或锦囊牌指定唯一目标后，其移去1枚“钝”，令所有角色进行判定，然后将目标改为结果点数最大的角色(点数相同则由你选择)，若更改后的目标与原目标相同，则使用者失去1点体力并结束此阶段。
skills.description_en: When you Use a damage-dealing card, you may give 1 target 1 「Blunted」 token. A character with a 「Blunted」 token, after Using a Basic or Tool card targeting only 1 character, removes the token — all characters perform a Judgment and the target changes to the character with the highest result rank (you choose on ties). If the new target is the same as the original, the user loses 1 HP and ends their Action Phase.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段每项限一次，你可以令一名角色:1.摸一张牌，然后弃置一半数量的手牌；2.弃一张牌，然后摸当前手牌数一半数量的牌(向上取整)。
skills.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: Have a character: 1. Draw 1 card then discard half their hand (rounded down); 2. Discard 1 card then draw half their current hand count (rounded up).

skills.description_cn: 当你于回合内使用【杀】或锦囊牌指定一名其他角色为目标后，若此牌是你本回合使用的第X张牌(为你的手牌数)，你可对其中一名目标角色造成1点伤害。
skills.description_en: When you Use [Kill] or a Tool card targeting another character during your turn, if that card is the Xth card you Used this turn (X = your current hand count), you may deal 1 damage to 1 of its targets.

skills.description_cn: 你可以将任意张牌置于牌堆底，视为使用一张需等量张【闪】抵消的【杀】。
skills.description_en: Place any number of cards at the bottom of the deck and be treated as using 1 [Kill] that requires the same number of [Dodge] to cancel.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你对其他角色造成伤害或受到其他角色的伤害时，若没有造成伤害的实体牌，此伤害+1，否则当前回合结束时，其将造成伤害的牌当【借刀杀人】或【过河拆桥】对你使用。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you deal damage to or take damage from another character, if there is no physical card as the source, that damage is +1; otherwise at the end of the current turn, they Use the card that caused the damage as [Proxy Attack] or [Dismantle] against you.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮开始时，你获得至多等同于你体力值名其他多色各一张手牌。你失去点数最小的手牌后，你可以展示手牌将手牌摸至体力上限。
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of each round, take up to X hand cards from other characters of different factions (max 1 per faction, X = your HP Value). After you lose your lowest-rank hand card, reveal your hand and draw cards until you have your Max HP hand cards.

skills.description_cn: 主公技，出牌阶段限一次，你可令一名其他魏势力角色摸一张牌，若如此做，则本轮内其使用普通锦囊牌对你无效。
skills.description_en: Lord Skill: Once per Action Phase: Have another Wei faction character draw 1 card; if you do, their Non Time-Delay Tool cards have no effect on you this round.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以弃置你与一名其他角色共计三张牌。若有角色因此失去三张牌，其对另一名角色造成1点伤害
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Discard a total of 3 cards between you and another character. If any character loses 3 cards this way, they deal 1 damage to another character.

skills.description_cn: 当你的牌因弃置而进入弃牌堆，或当你受到伤害后，你的手牌上限+1。结束阶段，若你的手牌数小于手牌上限，你可以将手牌摸至手牌上限（至多摸五张），然后重置因此技能而增加的手牌上限数。
skills.description_en: When your cards are placed into the Discard Pile via discarding, or when you take damage, your Hand Limit increases by 1. End Phase: if your hand count is less than your Hand Limit, draw cards up to your Hand Limit (max 5 drawn), then reset the Hand Limit bonus gained via this skill.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以选择一名其他角色，直到你下个回合开始前，其造成伤害时进行判定，若结果为:红色，受角色摸一张牌；黑色，此伤害。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Choose another character — until the start of your next turn, when they deal damage, perform a Judgment: if Red, the Wounded character draws 1; if Black, that damage is reduced by 1.

skills.description_cn: 限定技，其他角色死亡后，你可以增加点体力上限并失去“弘仪”，然后回复1点体力并获得其武将牌上的所有技能；当你处于濒死状态时，你可以增加2点体力上限，然后回复4点体力
skills.description_en: Limited: After another character dies, you may increase your Max HP by 1, lose 〖Expansive Grace〗, recover 1 HP, and gain all skills from their General Card. When you enter the Verge of Death State, increase your Max HP by 2 and recover 4 HP.

skills.description_cn: 每轮限一次，当一名角色因失去体力而进入濒死状态时，你可以令其回复1点体力并摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: Once per round: When a character enters the Verge of Death State due to losing HP, you may have them recover 1 HP and draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 手牌数唯一最多的角色出牌阶段开始时，你可以失去1点体力并摸张牌。若其不为你，你观看其一半数量的手牌(向下取整)，然后你可以用至多张手牌替换其中等量的牌(为你已损失的体力值)。
skills.description_en: At the start of the Action Phase of the character with the sole most hand cards, you may lose 1 HP and draw X cards (X = your HP Lost). If that character is not you, look at half their hand (rounded down); you may then replace up to X of those cards with your hand cards.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，若你装备区里的牌均为黑色，你获得“帷幕”，红色，你获得“明哲”，否则出牌阶段开始时，你声明一种类别，本回合你使用该类别的牌无距离次数限制。
skills.description_en: Locked: If all cards in your Equipment Zone are Black, gain 〖Iron Curtain〗. If all are Red, gain 〖Sagely Wisdom〗. Otherwise, at the start of your Action Phase, declare 1 card type — your cards of that type have no distance or count restriction this turn.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色的结束阶段，若不大于你的体力值，你摸X张牌(X为你本回合失去过的牌数)
skills.description_en: Locked: At a character's End Phase, if their hand count is ≤ your HP Value, draw X cards (X = cards you lost this turn).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你不能成为黑色锦囊牌的目标。
skills.description_en: Locked: You cannot be the target of Black Tool cards.

skills.description_cn: 当你于回合外使用或打出红色牌时，或于回合外因弃置而失去一张红色牌后，你可以摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: When you Use or Play a red card outside your turn, or lose a red card via discarding outside your turn, you may draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色展示手牌，然后其依次将其中的【杀】交给由其下家开始的每名角色，然后其对最后一名角色造成点伤害(最后一名角色展示手牌，为其中【杀】的数量且至多为2)。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have a character reveal their hand, then they pass each [Kill] in order to each character starting from their Right Neighbor, then deal X damage to the last character (the last character reveals their hand; X = [Kill] count they passed, max 2).

skills.description_cn: 当与你距离为以内的角色受到伤害后，你可以选择一项:1.令其获得弃牌堆中的一张【杀】；2.令其将一张手牌交给另一名角色，然后其摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: When a character within distance X of you takes damage (X = your Max HP), choose one: 1. Have them gain 1 [Kill] from the Discard Pile; 2. Have them give 1 hand card to another character, then draw 1.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，准备阶段，你令你与一名其他角色各回复1点体力，然后视为对该角色依次使用【杀】、【决斗】与【火攻】。其每因此受到1点伤害，你摸两张牌。
skills.description_en: Locked: Starting Phase: You and another character each recover 1 HP, then you are treated as using [Kill], [Duel], and [Incendiary] against them in sequence. For each 1 damage they take, you draw 2 cards.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段开始时，你将超出七张的手牌置于武将牌上。若此时你武将牌上有至少七张牌，其他角色依次选择一项：1.获得其中一张牌并令你回复1点体力：2.令你失去1点体力。
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of your Action Phase, place any hand cards over 7 on your character card. If ≥ 7 cards are on your character card, each other character chooses one: 1. Gain 1 of those cards and you recover 1 HP; 2. You lose 1 HP.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将所有手牌当一张无视防具的【杀】使用(至少一张)，若此【杀】造成伤害，你可以失去1点体力，然后将手牌摸至体力上限。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Use all hand cards (at least 1) as 1 [Kill] that ignores Armor. If it deals damage, you may lose 1 HP, then draw cards until you have your Max HP.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，出牌阶段，若你对攻击范围内的角色造成伤害，此阶段你对其使用牌无次数限制。
skills.description_en: Locked: During your Action Phase, if you deal damage to a character within your Attack Range, you have no count restriction when using cards against them this phase.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段各限一次，你可以选择一项:1.将手牌摸至体力上限，若如此做，本回合你不能再对其他角色使用牌；2.将X张手牌交给一名其他角色(X为你的手牌数减体力值)。
skills.description_en: Once per option per Action Phase: 1. Draw cards until you have your Max HP; if you do, you cannot use cards targeting other characters this turn. 2. Give X hand cards to another character (X = your hand count minus your HP Value).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，每回合好限一次，其他角色在其回合外获得手牌/回复体力后，你摸等量张牌/回复等量体力。
skills.description_en: Locked: Once per turn: After another character gains hand cards or recovers HP outside their turn, you draw the same number or recover the same amount.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以令一名角色摸两张牌或移动场上一张装备牌至其装备区内，然后若其手牌数大于等于存活人数，视为使用了一张【五谷丰登】(改为从该角色手牌中挑选)。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Have a character draw 2 cards or move 1 Equipment from the field into their zone. If their hand count is then ≥ the number of surviving players, be treated as using [Harvest] (drawing from their hand instead).

skills.description_cn: 其他角色的准备阶段，若其装备区里有牌，你可以对其使用一张无距离限制且无视防具的【杀】。
skills.description_en: During another character's Starting Phase, if they have cards in their Equipment Zone, you may Use 1 [Kill] against them with no distance restriction that ignores Armor.

skills.description_cn: 弃牌阶段开始时，你可以将任意张手牌置于武将牌上，称为“铃”每种花色至多一张)，你可以将 “铃”当手牌使用或打出，若如此做，你摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: At the start of your Discard Phase, you may place any hand cards on your character card as 「Bell」 tokens (max 1 per suit). You may Use or Play 「Bell」 tokens as hand cards; if you do, draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将任意张手牌交给一名其他角色，然后其可以将至多等量的手牌当一张【决斗】使用，此牌造成伤害后，若其为受伤角色/伤害来源，你弃置所有手牌/其摸X张牌(为转化此【决斗】的牌数)。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Give any number of hand cards to another character. They may Use up to that number of their own hand cards as 1 [Duel]. After that [Duel] deals damage: if they are the Wounded character, you discard all hand cards; if they are the source, they draw X cards (X = cards used to convert the [Duel]).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，一名角色结束阶段，你将手牌调整至三张。
skills.description_en: Locked: At a character's End Phase, adjust your hand count to 3 (draw or discard as needed).

skills.description_cn: 每轮各限一次，你/其他角色的出牌阶段开始时，你可以令当前回合角色摸X张牌（X为你已损失的体力值，至少为1且至多为3），然后本回合的弃牌阶段开始时，当前回合角色弃置所有非基本牌/基本牌。
skills.description_en: Once per round per option: At the start of your or another character's Action Phase, have the current turn character draw X cards (X = your HP Lost, min 1, max 3). Then at the start of their Discard Phase this turn, they discard all non-Basic cards (Yang) or all Basic cards (Yin).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你的手牌上限等于你的体力上限。当牌不因使用进入弃牌堆时，你记录这些牌的花色，然后若你记录了四种花色且体力上限小于8，你清除记录的花色并加1点体力上限。
skills.description_en: Locked: Your Hand Limit equals your Max HP. When cards enter the Discard Pile via any means other than being Used, record their suits. When you have recorded all 4 suits and your Max HP < 8, clear the record and increase your Max HP by 1.

skills.description_cn: 每轮各限一次，当至少两张基本牌/非基本牌一次性进入弃牌堆后，你可以减1点体力上限，将一张手牌当【决斗】/不计入次数且无次数限制的【杀】使用。
skills.description_en: Once per round per option: When ≥ 2 Basic or ≥ 2 non-Basic cards enter the Discard Pile at once, you may reduce your Max HP by 1 and Use 1 hand card as [Duel] (Basic option) or as [Kill] with no count restriction (non-Basic option).

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段，你可将任意张牌当一张【决斗】使用(至多为5，且本回合张数不可重复)。若你以此法对唯一目标造成了伤害，你可摸X张牌，然后你本回合不能再对目标角色发动此技能(X为你本回合使用牌指定其为目标的次数)。
skills.description_en: During your Action Phase, Use any number of cards as 1 [Duel] (max 5, and the count used cannot repeat this turn). If you deal damage via this to the only target, draw X cards, then you cannot activate this skill against them again this turn (X = times you have targeted them this turn).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你于回合内首次使用所有手牌(仅包含手牌指定仅一名其他角色为目标时，令其弃置X张牌 (为本回合你使用牌指定其为目标的次数)。
skills.description_en: Locked: The first time during your turn that you Use all your hand cards targeting only 1 other character, they discard X cards (X = times you targeted them this turn).

skills.description_cn: 游戏开始或回合开始时，若你的装备区里有【霹雳车】，你可以拜置一名其他角色的至多两张牌，若没有，将【霹雳车】置入你的装备区。
skills.description_en: Game start or turn start: if you have [Siege Engine] equipped, discard up to 2 cards from another character's zones. If you do not have [Siege Engine] equipped, place it into your Equipment Zone.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段限一次，你可以将一张手牌当上一轮所有角色均未使用过的普通锦囊牌使用。
skills.description_en: Once per Action Phase: Use 1 hand card as any Non Time-Delay Tool card that no character Used last round.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，回合开始时，若你的装备区里有【大攻车】你执行一个额外的出牌阶段，若没有，将【大攻车】置入你的装备区。
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, if you have [Great Siege Engine] equipped, perform an additional Action Phase. If not, place [Great Siege Engine] into your Equipment Zone.

skills.description_cn: 当你使用【杀】造成伤害后，你可以修改【大攻车】 (每张【大攻车】至多修改五次)。
skills.description_en: After your [Kill] deals damage, you may upgrade [Great Siege Engine] (max 5 upgrades per card).

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当你失去装备区里的【大攻车】后，你摸X张牌(为此【大攻车】修改的次数)。
skills.description_en: Locked: When you lose [Great Siege Engine] from your Equipment Zone, draw X cards (X = upgrades on that card).

skills.description_cn: 当其他角色死亡后，你可以摸三张牌，然后你选择 “武圣”、“当先”、“制蛮”中未拥有的一个技能获得。
skills.description_en: When another character dies, draw 3 cards, then choose 1 skill you do not yet have from 〖Saint of War〗, 〖Lead the Charge〗, and 〖Suppress Tribes〗, and gain it.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，你计算与其他角色的距离-X(X为存活的女性角色数)。
skills.description_en: Locked: Your distance to other characters is reduced by X (X = number of surviving Female characters).

skills.description_cn: 你可以将一张红色牌当【杀】使用或打出。你使用的方片【杀】无距离限制。
skills.description_en: You may Use or Play any red card as [Kill]. Your Diamonds [Kill] has no distance restriction.

skills.description_cn: 回合开始时，你执行一个额外的出牌阶段。此阶段开始时，你可以从牌堆或弃牌堆中获得一张无距离限制的【杀】，然后若你未于此阶段造成过伤害，阶段结束时你对自己造成1点伤害。
skills.description_en: Locked: At the start of your turn, perform an additional Action Phase. At the start of this extra phase, you may take 1 rangeless [Kill] from the deck or Discard Pile. If you dealt no damage during this extra phase, you take 1 damage at the end of it.

skills.description_cn: 当你对其他角色造成伤害时，你可以防止此伤害，然后你获得其装备区或判定区里的一张牌
skills.description_en: When you deal damage to another character, you may prevent that damage, then take 1 card from their Equipment Zone or Judgment Zone.

skills.description_cn: 一名角色死亡时，你可以令其选择其武将牌上的一个技能(限定技、觉醒技、主公技、隐匿技除外)，然后失去你上一次以此法获得的技能，获得此技能。
skills.description_en: When a character dies, you may have them choose 1 skill from their General Card (excluding Limited, Awakening, and Lord skills). You lose the last skill you gained via this, then gain the chosen skill.

skills.description_cn: 当你对一名其他角色造成伤害后，若其判定区没有牌，你可以将其一张牌置于其判定区。若此牌不是延时锦囊牌，则红色牌视为【乐不思蜀】，黑色牌视为【兵粮寸断】。结束阶段，若你本回合未造成过伤害，你可以摸一张牌。
skills.description_en: After you deal damage to another character, if their Judgment Zone is empty, place 1 of their cards there. If it is not a Time-Delayed Tool, Red cards act as [Acedia] and Black cards act as [Starvation]. End Phase: if you dealt no damage this turn, draw 1 card.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，每轮开始时，你进行次判定(X为你空置的装备栏数)，然后声明一种颜色并获得此颜色的判定牌。你的下个回合结束时，你执行一个额外的出牌阶段且你于此阶段内不能使用与声明颜色不同的牌，其他角色于此阶段内不能使用与你装备区里的牌颜色相同的牌直到有角色受到伤害时。
skills.description_en: Locked: Each round start, perform X Judgments (X = empty Equipment slots) and declare 1 color — gain the Judgment cards of that color. At the end of your next turn, perform an additional Action Phase where you cannot Use cards of the other color; other characters cannot Use cards matching the color of your equipped cards until someone takes damage.

skills.description_cn: 锁定技，当其他角色于其回合内使用第一张非装备牌后，若此牌与“椒遇”声明颜色相同/不同，你交给/获得其一张牌，然后失去牌的角色摸一张牌。你以此法获得的牌不计入手牌上限直到你的回合结束。
skills.description_en: Locked: When another character Uses their first non-Equipment card during their turn, if that card matches/does not match the color declared by 〖Pepper Encounter〗, you give them/gain from them 1 card; the character who lost a card draws 1. Cards you gain this way do not count toward your Hand Limit until the end of your turn.

skills.description_cn: 出牌阶段开始时，你可以摸两张牌或获得场上的一张牌，然后弃置一张牌。若弃置的牌:为基本牌，本回合你不能使用锦囊牌和装备牌且【杀】的使用次数+X且目标+1；为非基本牌，本回合你不能使用基本牌，且使用的普通锦囊牌的目标+1或-1，本回合前两次使用装备牌时摸张牌(X为手牌中因此技能不能使用的牌且至多为5)。
skills.description_en: Action Phase start: draw 2 or take 1 field card, then discard 1. If Basic: cannot use Tool/Equipment this turn; [Kill] count +X and targets +1 (X = unusable hand cards, max 5). If non-Basic: cannot use Basic this turn; Non Time-Delay Tools +1 or −1 target; first 2 Equipment uses this turn draw X cards.
